synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3359 Important: Oracle Linux 9 python-pyasn1 security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3359

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3359.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
python3-pyasn1-0.4.8-7.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-pyasn1-modules-0.4.8-7.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
python3-pyasn1-0.4.8-7.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-pyasn1-modules-0.4.8-7.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/python-pyasn1-0.4.8-7.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2026-23490




Description of changes:

[0.4.8-7]
- Resolves: RHEL-148154
